userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

statements.notes: Directions: For adults, take one (1) to five (5) microlozenges daily. Place microlozenge under tongue for 30 seconds before swallowing.

Vitamin B-12 is essential for normal formation of blood cells and contributes to the health of the nervous system.*There is no question about it. A good diet contributes to disease prevention, but sometimes stress, fast food meals and eating on the run can have nutritional consequences. One way to ensure that you are getting your Daily Values for B Vitamins is to take dietary supplements.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: WARNING: If you are pregnant, nursing or taking any medications, consult your doctor before use.
Discontinue use and consult your doctor if any adverse reactions occur.
Keep out of reach of children.
Store in a cool, dry place.
Do not use if seal under cap is broken or missing.

VEGETARIAN VEGAN FORMULA
GUARANTEED QUALITY
LABORATORY TESTED
No Gluten, No Yeast, No Milk or Milk Derivatives, No Lactose, No Soy, No Egg, No Grapefruit, No Fish, No Sugar, No Preservatives, No Artificial Flavor, No Sodium.
This statement has not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

Directions: For adults, take one (1) to five (5) microlozenges daily. Place microlozenge under tongue for 30 seconds before swallowing.
 Vitamin B-12 is essential for normal formation of blood cells and contributes to the health of the nervous system.*There is no question about it. A good diet contributes to disease prevention, but sometimes stress, fast food meals and eating on the run can have nutritional consequences. One way to ensure that you are getting your Daily Values for B Vitamins is to take dietary supplements.
 WARNING: If you are pregnant, nursing or taking any medications, consult your doctor before use. Discontinue use and consult your doctor if any adverse reactions occur. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place. Do not use if seal under cap is broken or missing.
